meaning: n.生动的场面,戏剧性局面
examples: The procession included a tableau of the Battle of Hastings.
She stood at the door observing the peaceful domestic tableau around the fire.
Tableau marries data computation with beautiful graphics.
Tableau Software, a big data visualization company, also went public today on the NYSE.
Then he used data analysis tools from Tableau Software to create the reports executives needed.
